answers.how ari you: How Are U Bread is a 2020 South Korean-Chinese web drama starring Kim Jun-myeon and Lee Se-young. The drama will be aired in South Korea and China simultaneously and is currently in discussion to air in 30 other countries.
answers.was going: "What's Going On" is a song by American singer-songwriter Marvin Gaye, released on January 21, 1971, on the Motown subsidiary Tamla. It is the opening track of Gaye's studio album of the same name.

answers.c syntax: C syntax is the form that text must have in order to be C programming language code. The language syntax rules are designed to allow for code that is terse, has a close relationship with the resulting object code, and yet provides relatively high-level data...
